author: Harry
description:
Strategic war mod focus on unique movement patterns, morale, and role-based combat.
Companion Mod: Dynamic World, Dynamic Units, Middle Kingdom Map.

A self-contained mod balanced for both base game and Dynamic World/Dynamic Unit. Compatibility with other mods are expected too. The mod adds many interesting battle dynamics that create more tactical depth, more fluid battle lines for a fun war experience. 

Key features:
Skirmishing: new unit mechanic where skirmisher units will retreat when attacked.
Friendly fire: AoE damage (e.g. Pierce, Splash) will now affect all units caught in the crossfire, including friendly and neutral ones
Hit-and-run: select ranged units can "Kite", that is move after attacking
Charge: select mounted melee units can now charge and scatter the target, pushing their way into a hostile tile
Significant AI, UI updates to handle the new features

Graphics provided by AND. Thanks for playing my mod, you can find me on the Old World Discord as ```Harry!```.
